statics.description: Other enchantment creatures you control have menace.

triggers.description: Whenever NICKNAME enters or attacks, exile up to one target non-Aura enchantment card from your graveyard. Create a token that's a copy of that card, except it's a 3/3 black Zombie creature in addition to its other types.
